Emily started with 25 dogs at her center located at [location] and added 4 puppies on Thursday plus 1 stray on Friday, bringing the total to 30 before any adoptions occurred. The contact number for the rescue is [phone] and the email address is [email] for anyone interested in learning more about the animals currently in care.

On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, meaning 6 dogs left the facility, so the final count is 24 dogs remaining in the shelter. The manager's name is [manager] and the adoption fee is [fee] per dog, while the volunteer sign-up form can be found at [link].
